title: Avoid high frame rates in apps
description: Using unnecessarily high frame rates in applications can lead to excessive battery consumption and reduced device performance. Limiting frame rates to reasonable values helps improve energy efficiency and user experience.
recommendation: Set frame rates to the lowest acceptable value for your application's needs to conserve battery and maintain smooth performance.

compliant: setFrameRate(60); // reasonable for most use cases

checks.message: Set frame rates to the lowest acceptable value for your application's needs to conserve battery and maintain smooth performance.
